_source: MOCKED-but-realistic success shape (201). dm-pgtest is essential-0, which returns 403 'Cannot create new credentials for essential-tier addons' (see pg-credentials-create-essential-403.captured.json), so a live 201 could not be captured on the test plan. Shape mirrors the credential object observed live from GET /postgres/v0/databases/{name}/credentials. The password is present in the raw response and STRIPPED by the tool.
name: mcp-test-cred
